emails.subject: West Curves
emails.body: West Curves Hey Chance, I'm going to be working on west curve validation...do you have any of the information. Joe Parks told me to contact you. Susan

emails.subject: RE: West Curves
emails.body: RE: West Curves what are you needing, i have the points that are needing to be reconstucted. Not all of them will need to be, just the ones with positions. PWC is currently making files for each point to be stored in. So we may need to touch base before starting. let me know. thanks, chance To: Rabon, Chance

emails.subject: RE: West Curves
emails.body: where are you these days? To: Scott, Susan M.

emails.subject: RE: West Curves
emails.body: back on 32. it is only about 25% full now. do you want to meet in the morning, around 9:30? To: Rabon, Chance

emails.subject: RE: West Curves
emails.body: sure....name the spot To: Scott, Susan M.

emails.subject: RE: West Curves
emails.body: i can come over there, what is your desk i will be there at 9:30. To: Rabon, Chance
